presence_results.note_evidence: Monica Hilpert is a 76-year-old woman admitted to skilled nursing facility care today, transferred from the acute hospital after an inpatient stay of nearly a week, for continued nursing care and rehabilitation
presence_results.rationale: Age, SNF admission, ~1 week hospitalization all stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: profound fatigue and deconditioning — by the end of the hospitalization she could not manage short household distances on her feet
presence_results.rationale: Deconditioning and inability to ambulate documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: History includes osteoporosis
hyperlipidemia
prediabetes
extensive tooth loss; she chews on one side only, and her meals have contracted over the years toward small, soft foods
presence_results.rationale: Tooth loss, one-side chewing, soft foods documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: a deep, aching low back pain radiating into both hips, worst with prolonged standing
presence_results.rationale: Matches location, radiation, aggravator, and quality.

presence_results.note_evidence: disturbs sleep on bad nights
guarded, slow position changes... Stands only with support
presence_results.rationale: Standing worsens pain, slow position changes, needs support to stand.
No naproxen mentioned in the note.

presence_results.note_evidence: Started meperidine hydrochloride 50 mg tablets for more severe pain, to be used sparingly
presence_results.rationale: Meperidine 50 mg PRN severe pain documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: close nursing observation for sedation, confusion, or unsteadiness given her age
presence_results.rationale: Counseling on opioid risks and monitoring documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: She lives alone with minimal social contact; her sister died two years ago, and a neighbor provides her only regular help
presence_results.rationale: Isolation, sister's death, neighbor help documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: She discloses a remote abusive marriage that she left; the former partner has no current presence in her life and she reports no present safety concerns
raising concern for longstanding under-nutrition
Social work to arrange home supports before discharge and to connect her with community or senior-center programs
Dietitian consultation for texture-modified, protein- and calcium-forward meals balanced for glucose and lipids
presence_results.rationale: Dietitian referral matches all diet elements.

presence_results.note_evidence: Physical therapy for safe transfers, standing tolerance, and gait strengthening
Occupational therapy sessions for dressing, bathing safety, and daily tasks
History and physical examination and the initial patient assessment were completed today
the initial patient assessment were completed today
Development of individualized plan of care with the interdisciplinary team
Daily nursing care and supplementary surveillance every shift (pain, vital signs, skin, medications)
presence_results.rationale: Every-shift surveillance of listed items documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Strict call-before-standing instruction reinforced; call bell education provided and accepted
Formal pre-discharge assessment of mobility, medication and meal management, and home setup prior to release
Anticipate a stay of roughly two weeks depending on functional progress
regimen to be changed if poorly tolerated
transferred from the acute hospital after an inpatient stay of nearly a week

presence_results.rationale: Note documents H&P completed but not finalization of an H&P document.
